# Argo Smart Routing

Route web traffic across the fastest, most reliable network paths

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [Argo Smart Routing llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/llms-full.txt) for the complete Argo Smart Routing documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Overview

- [Argo Smart Routing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/index.md): Route traffic across the fastest network paths to reduce latency and packet loss.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/get-started/index.md): Learn how to enable Argo Smart Routing in the Cloudflare dashboard.

## Analytics

- [Analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/analytics/index.md): View latency improvements and response time data for Argo Smart Routing.

## Argo for Packets

- [Argo for Packets](https://developers.cloudflare.com/argo-smart-routing/argo-for-packets/index.md): Optimize IP layer routing for Magic Transit, Cloudflare WAN, and Cloudflare for Offices.
